TITLE: The MildMate BedBridge Connector | Creates a Truly Seamless King Bed from Two Mattresses | No-Strap System
DESCRIPTION:
Transform Two Mattresses into One Seamless Luxury Bed
Say goodbye to the annoying gap between your mattresses. The MildMate BedBridge is the premium solution for joining Twin XLs into a King, or connecting any two mattresses for a co-sleeping family setup.

Why MildMate is Different:
• Premium Microfiber Filling (Not Foam): 
Unlike other product which use cheap memory foam that traps heat and crumbles over time, we use high-density microfiber. It acts like a "firm cloud" filling the gap—breathable, durable, and naturally cooling.

• Breathable & Hygienic: 
Because it allows airflow, you won't wake up sweating in the middle of the bed.

• Smart No-Strap System: 
No complicated buckles or straps to wrestle with. Our bridge is designed to stay in place with friction and the tension of your fitted sheet.

• True Gap Elimination: 
The T-shape wedge creates a smooth transition, allowing you to use the full width of your bed without sinking into the "crack."

Ideal For:
• Converting two Twin XLs into a King Bed.
• Family beds and co-sleeping arrangements.
• Couples with different mattress firmness preferences who need a unified surface.

▶ HOW IT WORKS: THE MILDMATE SECRETOur revolutionary system is brilliantly simple and effective:

1. The BedBridge Connector: A plush, high-density foam bridge that comfortably fills the gap between your two mattresses.

2. The 360° Fitted Sheet (Essential & Sold Separately): This is the magic! Our deep-pocket, elasticized sheet is custom-made to cover both mattresses and the bridge. It provides powerful, even tension to pull everything together into a single, unified bed.

The result? No straps, no bumps, no gaps. Just one perfect, uninterrupted sleep surface.

❌ NOT SUITABLE FOR:
• Mattresses of different heights or lengths (e.g., a King + Double).
• Beds with deep pillow-tops or heavily rounded edges, which can create an uneven fit.Our standard BedBridge is 190 cm (75") long. Perfect for combining two Twin, Twin XL, or Double beds.

📏 Precise Dimensions for Universal Fit:
• Width: 30 cm (11.8") - optimal gap coverage for most mattress combinations
• Height: 20 cm (8") - suitable for standard mattress heights and depths
• Length: 190 cm (75") - full coverage for standard bed lengths
• Gap Capacity: Fills gaps up to 2.5 cm wide effectively

🌟 Why One Size Fits All (Even 80"/ 203cm Beds!):
• Our BedBridge is 75" (190cm) long, intentionally designed to universally fit standard and extra-long beds.
• For 80" beds (like Twin XL or King), simply center the bridge. It leaves a tiny 2.5" space under your pillows and at the very foot of the bed.
• Because our required 360-degree elastic fitted sheet pulls tightly across the entire surface, these tiny edges are completely hidden and won't be felt while sleeping. No custom sizes needed!

What’s Included in This Order:
• 1x High-Density T-Shaped BedBridge (190cm / 75" length)
• Please note: This listing is for the foam BedBridge only.,

▶ Important Care & Setup Instructions:
• Expansion Time: Your BedBridge is tightly rolled for eco-friendly shipping. Please allow 24 hours for the microfiber to fully expand and regain its shape after unboxing.
• Washing: Spot clean or hand wash only.
• Drying: DO NOT Tumble Dry. Air dry flat to maintain the structure of the microfiber filling.
